query:
INSERT INTO house_document_vaults (house_id, vault_name, vault_hash, encryption_enabled, vault_status) 
VALUES (1, 'Master Trust Vault', SHA2(CONCAT('master_vault_', NOW()), 256), TRUE, 'active')
